name: Software Requirements Analysis
purpose: The purpose is to establish a structured and analyzed set of software requirements consistent with the system requirements, and the system architecture.

outcomes.text: Software requirements are structured and prioritized.
Software requirements are analyzed for correctness and technical feasibility.
The impact of software requirements on the operating environment is analyzed.
Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between software requirements and system requirements.
Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between software requirements and system architecture.
The software requirements are agreed and communicated to all affected parties.

basePractices.title: Structure software requirements
basePractices.description: Structure and prioritize the software requirements. product variants. release scopes. Refer to SPL.2.BP1.

basePractices.title: Analyze software requirements
basePractices.description: Analyze the specified software requirements including their interdependencies to ensure correctness, technical feasibility, and to support project management regarding project estimates. prototyping.

basePractices.title: Analyze the impact on the operating environment
basePractices.description: Analyze the impact that the software requirements will have on elements in the operating environment.

basePractices.title: Ensure consistency and establish bidirectional traceability
basePractices.description: Ensure consistency and establish bidirectional traceability between software requirements and system architecture.
